mapper.sql: r.id, r.rule_name AS ruleName, r.warning_type AS warningType, r.period_days AS periodDays, r.trigger_threshold AS triggerThreshold, r.applicable_store_ids AS applicableStoreIds, r.status AS status, r.remark AS remark, r.created_by AS createdBy, r.updated_by AS updatedBy, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(r.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_exception_warning_rule (rule_name, warning_type, period_days, trigger_threshold, applicable_store_ids, status, remark, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{warningType}, #{periodDays}, #{triggerThreshold}, #{applicableStoreIds}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM pt_exception_warning_rule WHERE id IN
#{id}
